assertions: The first run labels every returned pin as First snapshot.
A later run labels current pins as New in search results, Moved up, Moved down, or Unchanged.
Pins present in the latest earlier snapshot but absent now are labeled No longer visible.
Positive Movement means the pin moved closer to position one.
Snapshot at, Position, Previous position, Movement, Saves, and Repins are numeric Sheet fields.
Pin and Image are readable Google Sheets hyperlinks rather than long raw URLs.
Every row has a stable date, query, pin ID, and unique Snapshot key.
Same-day reruns update existing Snapshot keys rather than appending duplicates.
The workflow uses only Apify and Google Sheets credentials.
The output never presents search-result movement as search volume, popularity, clicks, sales, or demand.
